title: BR-002A: re-scope the saw_lab/rmos store-layer kwarg candidate + issue the archaeology Dev Order (docs-only)
intent: Correct the BR-001 living-remediation artifacts after BR-002 execution invalidated two load-bearing assumptions in the next-candidate packet: the failing path is app/saw_lab/executions_list_service.py:62 -> app.rmos.runs_v2.store.list_runs_filtered(tool_kind=...) (not store_api.py:200), and the fix crosses the shared store_filter.matches_index_meta boundary used by all runs_v2 consumers (module-level dispatch unresolved). Record the corrected call path and the wrong prior citation; mark the candidate SCOPE CORRECTION REQUIRED across ledger, defect register, dependency map, and queue; and issue BR-002A (store-path archaeology / contract proof, no production mutation) as the next Dev Order, with BR-002B (additive repair) authorized only after 002A is green. Documentation plus this governance manifest only; no production code, schema, route, or build change.

diff_articulation.what_changed: Corrects the next-candidate scope in the remediation program docs and adds the BR-002A archaeology Dev Order. No source, schema, route, or test file is touched.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: The prior candidate packet cited the wrong RMOS file and under-scoped a central-store + shared-filter change; leaving it uncorrected would make a future implementation outrun its authorization. This records the corrected scope and issues the bounded archaeology tranche.

commands_run: git diff --name-only origin/main..HEAD -> only docs/remediation/ plus this manifest (production-neutral)
traced app/saw_lab/executions_list_service.py:62 -> app.rmos.runs_v2.store.list_runs_filtered; store_filter.matches_index_meta has no tool_kind param (evidence for the scope correction)

files.intent: This CBSP21 manifest for the docs-only re-scope change set.
BR-002 row: correct file citation + mark SCOPE CORRECTION REQUIRED.
BR-002 reproduction basis corrected to store.py + shared filter.
store-layer cluster re-scoped (not one isolated pass).
Wave 1 Rank 1 split into BR-002A -> BR-002B.
Replace the mis-scoped packet: SCOPE CORRECTION REQUIRED, redirect to BR-002A.
The BR-002A archaeology / contract-proof Dev Order (no production mutation).

no_backend_no_schema: No backend API, route, schema, persistence, or build change. All changes are documentation under docs/remediation/ plus this CBSP21 governance manifest. No production code is touched.
